title: Luffy Enters the War
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Pacifista, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Pacifista, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy enters the war.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Impossible! The pirate empress was defeated !!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Insolent swine!! Get back, I say!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I shall not permit you to pass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kuma is dead!!? What nonsense is this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's standing right in front of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: IVA-CHAN, DO YOU KNOW THIS GUY!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: However, there is something strange about him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ....!? What's this guy going on about!?
